name: ai-proxy
description: Proxy que traduce peticiones Anthropic Messages API a OpenAI Chat Completions API y viceversa

scripts.dev:openrouter: TARGET_API_KEY=$OPENROUTER_API_KEY TARGET_MODEL=google/gemini-2.5-pro TARGET_BASE_URL=https://openrouter.ai/api npm run dev
scripts.dev:openai: TARGET_API_KEY=$OPENAI_API_KEY TARGET_MODEL=gpt-4o TARGET_BASE_URL=https://api.openai.com npm run dev
